pages.title: Human
pages.text: Normal size. No innate traits. No drawback.$(br2)At world creation a second screen asks you to pick one $(bold)boon$(/) from seven. The boon is your identity.

pages.title: The seven boons
pages.text: $(li)$(l:races/human_tough)Tough$(/l) — +4 max health.$(li)$(l:races/human_quick)Quick$(/l) — +5% movement speed.$(li)$(l:races/human_reach)Far-Reaching$(/l) — +1 block reach and attack range.$(li)$(l:races/human_hardy)Hardy$(/l) — immune to the Hunger effect.$(li)$(l:races/human_surefooted)Sure-Footed$(/l) — fall damage cut 60%.$(li)$(l:races/human_strongarm)Strong Arm$(/l) — +1 melee damage.$(li)$(l:races/human_steadyaim)Steady Aim$(/l) — bow and crossbow damage +15%.$(br)Each boon is no-drawback. Pick the one that fits your class.
